description_long: This object consists of three stylized mushroom forms, each with a distinct cap and stem design. The left mushroom has a reddish-brown, star-shaped cap with a greenish, twisted stem. The central mushroom features a deep blue, rounded cap with a smooth, single black stem. The right mushroom displays a pinkish-red, oval cap with subtle striping and is supported by four green, splayed legs. The surfaces of the caps are matte and slightly textured, with the rightmost cap showing a striped pattern. The stems and legs are smooth and appear sturdy, giving the mushrooms a whimsical, sculptural appearance. These mushrooms are grouped together, suggesting a decorative or artistic installation suitable for urban parks or themed public spaces.
description: A group of three stylized mushrooms with distinct cap shapes and colors, featuring textured caps and smooth, sturdy stems or legs. The arrangement is whimsical and decorative, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Three mushrooms are visible from the front, showing their unique cap shapes and colors: reddish-brown star, blue rounded, and pinkish-red oval.
description_view_1: The view from behind highlights the blue and pinkish-red mushrooms, with the green legs of the right mushroom and the back of the blue cap most prominent.
description_view_2: A mirrored angle of view 0, again showing all three mushrooms, with the pinkish-red cap now on the left and the reddish-brown star cap on the right.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the backs of the reddish-brown and blue mushrooms, with the green stem and legs more visible.
attribute_cap_pattern: striped and smooth with subtle texturing
